results.justification: EXACT TWIN — TTKV temporal-tiered KV cache with reduced cross-tier traffic IS the 3-tier KV cache + wooden-bridge cross-tier sliding-window scheme.
EXACT TWIN — 3-tier HBM-DRAM-SSD KV cache hierarchy with layer-wise pipelining IS the Pier/Dwelling/Attic tier persistence architecture.
EXACT TWIN — hierarchical context caching with decoupled tier memory layouts IS the multi-tier persistent memory hierarchy.
EXACT TWIN — multi-tier dynamic storage with selective KV reuse + adaptive hierarchical eviction IS the tidal-flux adaptive eviction mechanism.
EG-MLA token-specific embedding gating in latent space IS the wooden-bridge gated cross-tier access mechanism applied to compressed KV.

results.matched_effect_cluster: persistent Q4 KV cache multi-agent edge
results.justification: Persistent quantized KV cache for multi-agent edge inference is the persistent-tier (Attic) analog with compression.
ContextKeeper Context-Anchored (CA) heads + head-specific KV retention IS the flexible-pile foundation anchor concept at head granularity.
Batched KV store/load pipelining + persistent KV-cache anchoring for vLLM covers the shared persistent base-embedding anchor across serving sessions.
